# opnsense_quagga_ospf_redistribution (Resource)

Manages an OSPF redistribution on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `redistribute` (String) Source to redistribute into OSPF.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this redistribution is enabled.
- `route_map` (String) UUID of a route map to apply.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
